requirement_summary: User authentication via a login screen.

test_cases.title: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User must have a registered account
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard

test_cases.title: Login attempt with invalid password
preconditions: User must have a registered account
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect password

test_cases.title: Login attempt with empty fields
steps: Leave username and password fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors are displayed prompting for required fields

test_cases.title: Boundary test with maximum length password
preconditions: User must have a registered account
test_cases.expected_result: User is able to login successfully or receives appropriate error if limits exceeded

test_cases.title: Unauthorized access attempt via URL manipulation
steps: Modify the login URL directly to access secure page
Attempt to access the page without login
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page or receives an access denied message

gherkin_scenarios.steps:
Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters valid credentials
And clicks the login button
Then the user is redirected to the dashboard

Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters a valid username and incorrect password
Then an error message is displayed

uncovered_areas: Potential integration with third-party authentication services handling
